title: Deepslate Crafting & Cutting
description: Craft Deepslate into Cobbled Deepslate OR use on the Stonecutter for all Deepslate recipes!
body:
Tired of swapping out your Silk Touch pick just to get craftable Cobbled Deepslate blocks?

Now you can convert Deepslate directly to Cobbled, or use Deepslate on the Stonecutter to craft any of the other Deepslate variations.

Crafting recipes include:
- Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate
- Stonecutter recipes include:
- Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate
- Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate Slabs
- Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate Stairs
- Deepslate to Cobbled Deepslate Wall
- Deepslate to Polished Deepslate
- Deepslate to Polished Deepslate Slabs
- Deepslate to Polished Deepslate Stairs
- Deepslate to Polished Deepslate Wall
- Deepslate to Deepslate Bricks
- Deepslate to Deepslate Brick Slabs
- Deepslate to Deepslate Brick Stairs
- Deepslate to Deepslate Brick Wall
- Deepslate to Deepslate Tiles
- Deepslate to Deepslate Tile Slabs
- Deepslate to Deepslate Tile Stairs
- Deepslate to Deepslate Tile Wall
- Deepslate to Chiseled Deepslate
